name: gecko-surf
description: Make any API agent-usable — even one with broken docs, no OpenAPI, a WAF, or an auth wall. Comprehend a spec (or JS-rendered docs) into first-call-correct MCP tools your agent calls right the first time (10% → 65% on a painful API, measured), auth injected, no integration code. Installs a live TxLINE demo surface.
